message:
You know that one friend who panics at the slightest hint of a storm? Yep, that’s my buddy Sarah. Last month, when the weather radar showed a chance of rain (just a chance!), she was already texting me about her emergency plan. 😅 

While I love her enthusiasm, it got me thinking about how easy it is to overlook our own preparedness. I mean, I’ve got a go-bag, but how often do I check it? Or review our family’s emergency contacts? 

So, I took a little time to refresh my own plans and even had a fun chat with my family about what to do if we ever needed to hunker down. It felt good to be proactive instead of reactive. 

If you’re like me and sometimes need a little nudge to stay ready, maybe this little refresher helped! Do you have a friend who’s the ultimate planner or the one who always panics? How do you balance each other out?
